concept: Shower thoughts, but make it existential
title: Funny Shower Curtain - 'Am I Wet or Just Crying?' Hilarious Bathroom Decor
description:
You know those deep moments in the shower when your brain decides to question everything, including your entire emotional state? Well, this shower curtain is here to lean into the chaos with humor and slight existential dread. Let's just say it's a mood—every single morning. 

Perfect for:
• Anyone who uses the shower as their personal therapist.
• Lovers of irreverent, self-deprecating humor.
• That one friend who’s always saying, 'What if we’re all just Sims?' 

DETAILS:
• A bold and quirky design displayed across the curtain reads, 'Am I Wet or Just Crying?' in dynamic, hand-drawn typography surrounded by playful teardrop doodles. 
• Vibrant dual-tone palette ensures it pops in any bathroom setup, whether you’re rocking a neutral vibe or dark, moody aesthetics.
• Made-to-order, just like your life crises (but more fun).

100% Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton (Bella Canvas 3001) — lightweight 4.2 oz/yd² (142 g/m²) for breathability
Retail crew neckline with ribbed knit collar and shoulder tape for shape retention
Side seams and tear-away label for fit stability and comfort
Vibrant, crisp printing: DTF or DTG depending on provider for detailed sleeve/label prints
Ethically sourced/REACH certified; blank product sourced from Honduras; multiple fabric blends for heathered colors

Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)
Non-chlorine: bleach as needed
Tumble dry: low heat
Iron, steam or dry: medium heat
Do not dryclean

Shipped by BanterWearCo. Questions? Message me — I respond faster than a teenager asked to take out the trash. (Low bar, admittedly.)
